data.title: SOL price predicted to reach $315 short-term, with analysts expecting $280-$315 range in next 4 weeks based on technical indicators and strong volume.
data.description: Forecasts for SOL suggest a positive trend aiming for a resistance level of $315, backed by technical analysis indicating a potential trading range of $280-$315 in the next four weeks. This prediction is supported by high trading volume and signals from the MACD indicator.

data.title: Akemona unveils Tokenization Cloud to boost digital asset adoption in financial markets, aiding institutions & businesses.
data.description: In Fullerton, California on October 3, 2025, Akemona revealed its Tokenization Cloud, a cutting-edge infrastructure system allowing financial institutions and businesses to incorporate digital assets on a large scale. This launch is significant in the U.S. at this time.

data.title: Elastic named Leader in 2025 IDC MarketScape for XDR software with strong search foundation.
data.description: In San Francisco, Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) has been recognized as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape report for Worldwide Extended Detection and Response (XDR) Software in 2025. The research document,  bearing the code US52997325 and published in September 2025, highlighted Elastic’s standout position in the XDR market. Chris Kissel, the research vice president for Security & Trust Products at IDC, noted that Elastic's expertise in search technology sets it apart in the industry. Elastic's integration of SIEM, XDR, and cloud security functions into a unified platform was particularly praised.

data.title: Smith+Nephew introduces ALLEVYN COMPLETE CARE 5-Layer Foam Dressing for pressure injury prevention, supported by scientific data.
data.description: Smith+Nephew, a leading medical technology company trading on NYSE as SNN and LSE as SN, has unveiled groundbreaking findings by Professor Amit Gefen and team in the International Wound Journal. The study highlights the effectiveness of ALLEVYN COMPLETE CARE Foam Dressing in preventing pressure injuries by absorbing and dispersing friction and shear forces. This research underscores the importance of the product in wound care.

data.title: Cryptocurrency hacks decrease by 37% in Q3 2025, but million-dollar attacks peak in September, marking a shift in hacker tactics.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, losses from cryptocurrency hacks decreased by 37% compared to the previous quarter. However, September witnessed a surge in million-dollar attacks, reaching a record high. Hackers have changed their tactics from targeting code vulnerabilities to exploiting weaknesses in wallets and operational systems. This shift presents new challenges to digital asset platforms, highlighting the evolving threat landscape in the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: PATEO's revenue and profit grow, gross profit rises by 38.3% in interim report post IPO. Important numbers: 38.3% gross profit growth in first half.
data.description: PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., traded under stock code 2889.HK, recently unveiled its initial half-year report post IPO in October 2025. The financial statements highlighted significant enhancements, including a notable 38.3% surge in gross profit. This achievement underscores the company's continued growth and strength in the market.

data.title: Siyata Mobile merges with Core Gaming, becomes Core AI Holdings, Inc. New Board, trading on Oct 7, 2025, and Reverse Stock Split on the same day.
data.description: The merger was finalized on October 3, 2025, and a new Board of Directors has been appointed to lead the strategic shift into an AI holding company. The combined entity has been rebranded as Core AI Holdings, Inc. Trading of the new company's shares is set to commence on October 7, 2025. Additionally, a Reverse Stock Split will come into effect on the same date.

data.title: XRP price likely to hit $3.30-$3.50 in 7 days with strong support at $2.90. Technical indicators are bullish.
data.description: Analysts are predicting that the price of XRP could reach between $3.30 and $3.50 in the upcoming week, supported by bullish momentum. The cryptocurrency has strong backing at $2.90, indicating a positive outlook. Technical analysis for Ripple suggests favorable conditions for further growth.

data.title: Coil increases equity by €1.3 million through capital raise subscribed by company executives & management.
data.description: Coil has recently bolstered its equity through a substantial capital increase of €1.3 million, which was subscribed by the company's executive and management team.

data.title: Transgene to unveil immunological data from Phase I trial of cancer vaccine TG4050 at SITC. Important dates: Nov 5-9, 2025.
data.description: In Strasbourg, France, on October 3, 2025, at 5:45 p.m. CET, Transgene, a biotech company trading on Euronext Paris under the ticker TNG, specializes in designing and developing virus-based immunotherapies for cancer treatment. The company is set to showcase a poster at the 40th Annual Meeting of the Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer (SITC) in National Harbor, Maryland, USA, from November 5 to 9, 2025. The poster will provide a detailed analysis of the neoantigen-specific T cell response observed in the randomized Phase I trial of their personalized therapeutic cancer vaccine, TG4050.

data.title: Banco Santander Chile to hold 3Q 2025 financial results conference call-webcast on Nov 5th at 10 AM NY time. Executives include CFO and Chief Strategy Officer.
data.description: Join us for Banco Santander Chile's conference call-webcast on Wednesday, November 5, 2025, at 10.00 AM NY time (12.00 PM Chile time) to review the financial performance in the third quarter of 2025. The conference will feature key executives including Patricia Pérez, CFO, Cristian Vicuña, Chief Strategy Officer & Head of IR, and Lorena Palomeque, Economist. Following the presentation, there will be a Q&A session for participants. Mark your calendars for this important event by Banco Santander Chile (NYSE: BSAC).

data.title: Mesa Labs to announce Q2 results on Nov 6, 2025. (NASDAQ: MLAB). Press release will be issued post market close.
data.description: In Lakewood, Colorado on October 3, 2025, Mesa Laboratories, Inc. announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 after the market closes on Thursday, November 6, 2025. Mesa Laboratories, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol MLAB. Investors and stakeholders can expect detailed information about their performance during this period on the specified date.

data.title: Samsung partners with Coinbase to provide 75M wallet users access to buying crypto in the U.S. in latest move to embrace cryptocurrencies.
data.description: After several years of enabling its smartphones to function as crypto wallets, Samsung is now facilitating the purchase of cryptocurrencies for device owners in the United States through Coinbase. This move aims to simplify the process of buying digital currencies for Samsung users in the U.S. who can now access and trade various cryptocurrencies directly through the Coinbase platform. This development signifies a significant step in enhancing accessibility and convenience for individuals looking to engage in the crypto market using their Samsung devices.

data.title: First Bank opens new $4B assets branch in Morristown, TN, marking its 28th location. Exciting expansion.
data.description: A financial services firm, First Bank and Trust Company, has recently opened its 28th full-service branch in Morristown, Tennessee. The branch, boasting a range of services, marks the firm's expansion with total assets amounting to $4 billion.

data.title: Quantum stocks RGTI and D-Wave are trending, Q/C Technologies (QCLS) announces pivot into quantum computing with LightSolver's technology.
data.description: Stocks in the quantum computing sector saw a surge on Friday following significant buzz on social media throughout the week. RGTI stock is notably on the rise, with Q/C Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: QCLS) being a key player in this movement, previously known as TNF Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: TNFA). The company recently made a strategic shift towards quantum computing, obtaining exclusive global rights to LightSolver's light-speed laser processing unit (LPU) for use in the cryptocurrency sector. Highlighting their commitment to innovation, Joshua Silverman, the chairman of Q/C Technologies, stated that the rebranding signifies their forward-looking approach. This move positions the company at the forefront of the quantum computing realm, particularly in the lucrative cryptocurrency industry. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
